title: Resolve all merge conflicts in test vectors, SCHC, RPL, sim and announce Python code

Incorporate all new vector functions (schc_fragment, ccp_load_balancing, ccp16, ccp9 with independent _l2_announce_with_channel oracle using exact wire format).
